title: cinnamomum bourgeauvianum
intro: Cinnamomum bourgeauvianum, also known as Indian camphor, is a plant species in the laurel family that is native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Cinnamomum bourgeauvianum include its use as a natural remedy for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
